macro.title: Dow rises 500 points as oil retreats on Iran deal progress; AMD jumps after earnings: Live updates - CNBC
macro.summary: Buoyed by solid earnings and lower oil prices, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite both reached new intraday and closing highs on Tuesday.

macro.title: Some iPhone owners could get up to $95 payment after Apple agrees to settle case for $250 million - AP News
macro.summary: Apple has agreed to a $250 million settlement in a class-action lawsuit over false advertising of Siri's AI capabilities. The lawsuit claims Apple misled consumers by promoting features that didn't exist when the iPhone 16 launched in 2024. If approved, the d…

macro.title: Josh D’Amaro Lays Out “Long-Term View” for Disney in First Earnings Report Since Taking Over as CEO - The Hollywood Reporter
macro.summary: Disney reported its fiscal second-quarter earnings early Wednesday morning, beating Wall Street expectations, with D'Amaro laying out his thoughts on AI, original IP, and that new Abu Dhabi park.

macro.title: A trip to Europe? In this economy? Expensive flights keep vacations closer to home - NPR
macro.summary: Travel advisers are seeing Americans picking cheaper domestic travel destinations over Europe.
